overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk industrial district at night. Heavy rain and fog reduce visibility while red and blue neon lights illuminate the concrete architecture, creating a dystopian atmosphere typical of high-end video game graphics.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow rain-soaked cyberpunk alley, approaching a bright red neon sign that hangs overhead. The futuristic dashboard glows with internal lighting as rain streaks down the windshield.

segments.scene_description: Navigating a darker industrial corridor lined with concrete pillars and orange barriers. The red neon sign fades behind as the vehicle moves deeper into the industrial zone with reduced lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial loading zone with distant neon illumination

events.description: blue neon lights become visible in the distance on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the industrial area toward distant blue neon lights visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the industrial district with distant blue neon lights becoming visible on the right through the heavy rain. The environment opens slightly as the vehicle approaches the illuminated area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a rain-soaked industrial district that shifts from the glow of red neon to a darker, blue-lit urban expanse. It begins by driving through a narrow cyberpunk alley, where rain streaks across the windshield and the futuristic dashboard glows as the vehicle approaches a bright red neon sign overhead. As the red light fades, the camera navigates deeper into a darker industrial corridor lined with concrete pillars and orange barriers. The scene then opens slightly, moving through the heavy rain as distant blue neon lights emerge on the right. The vehicle finally pushes forward into the illuminated industrial zone, leaving the oppressive narrowness of the alley behind.
